ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDS, JAMES

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, CHARLES TRACEY IS AWARDED JUDGMENT OF $2,750.00 AND RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 505 O'FARRELL STREET, #316, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 9AM, 12-7-94. THERE ARE NO OTHER PERSONS ON THE PREMISES WHO CAN CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE SHALL WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. IF DEFENDANT, JAMES BOLDS MEETS ALL OBLIGATIONS, VACATES THE PREMISES BEFORE THE ACTUAL EVICTION DATE AND TURNS OVER THE KEYS TO THE PLAINTIFF, THE PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE THE JUDGMENT SATISFIED IN FULL OR THE JUDGMENT MAY BE SET ASIDE AND THE CASE DISMISSED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDS, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505 O'FARRELL STREET, #316, SAN FRANCISCO $2,750.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,750.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
